rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed inside `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax within component type or implementation annexes.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture scope and owner relationships when inserting annex content.
Use component implementation annexes for bindings and assignments valid in that scope.
Align helper declaration types with expression types to avoid type mismatches.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
anti_patterns: Do not place AGREE annex blocks outside of valid AADL annex locations.
